policy: Only import public-domain, permissively licensed, explicitly licensed, or user-contributed data. Reference-only sources are not bulk-copied.

sources.name: Learners Manipuri-English Dictionary (H. Surmangol Sharma) via DSAL
sources.use: Manual citation, lexical comparison, canonical review support; do not bulk-copy entries without permission.

sources.name: LDC-IL Gold Standard Manipuri Raw Text Corpus
sources.use: Frequency lists, domain coverage, corpus statistics after proper access/licence.

sources.name: LDC-IL Manipuri Speech Corpus
sources.use: Future pronunciation, ASR/TTS, spoken form validation.

sources.name: DayanandaThokchom Meitei Mayek to English parallel dataset
sources.use: Translation memory research and Meitei Mayek alignment if licence permits.

sources.name: DayanandaThokchom English to Meitei Mayek dataset
sources.use: English draft translation experiments if licence permits.

sources.name: MWire Labs Meitei Monolingual Corpus (Bengali Script)
sources.use: Frequency modelling and script conversion pipeline with attribution and share-alike compliance.

sources.name: Bidirectional Bengali Script and Meetei Mayek Transliteration of Web Based Manipuri News Corpus
sources.use: Transliteration rules and literature review; not a raw data source unless dataset is licensed.

sources.name: MECOS Manipuri-English code-switching speech corpus
sources.use: Future code-switching model design and speech research.

sources.name: MeiteiMayek.com transliteration tools
sources.use: Compare transliteration behavior; do not scrape service.

sources.name: Wiktionary Meitei entries
sources.use: Open lexical seed where entries are available; preserve attribution and licence.

sources.name: Glosbe Manipuri-English dictionary
sources.use: Discovery/reference; do not bulk-copy without terms permission.

sources.name: MayekAma community word submissions
sources.use: Primary growth path for canonical Roman Manipuri standard.

sources.name: MWire Labs Meitei Monolingual Corpus
sources.use: Candidate extraction with attribution/share-alike review; not direct final standard.
sources.notes: Bengali-script Meitei corpus; useful for frequency and terminology.

sources.name: Meitei Mayek to English parallel corpus
sources.use: Parallel examples and translation memory after validation.
sources.notes: Needs Romanisation layer before MayekAma import.

sources.name: English to Meitei Mayek parallel corpus
sources.notes: Useful for later English-to-Roman Manipuri drafts.

sources.name: TTS dataset for Manipuri Latin script
sources.notes: Potential Romanised examples; verify licence before import.

sources.name: Manipuri monolingual corpus
sources.use: Discovery only until licence and provenance are checked.
sources.notes: Dataset card says compiled from publicly available texts; still needs licence confirmation.
